calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day.
Dept. 304-B, JPT: Arnold Evje, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Jessica Chylik, Esq. for Plaintiff Den Del Castillo, also present.
James Gabbard, Esq., for Defendants, Hector F. Perez (not present) and Aura Castanon Milo, present with Spanish Interpreter form ACCESS, Christina Llop.
Parties met in Dept.304-B and reached a settlement by Stipulation for Entry of Judgment, or for Dismissal of the action With Prejudice. Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to vacate the premises on or before March 31, 2004. Upon timely vacate of the premises will receive $2,000.00 and no other deposit, Plaintiff will dissmiss the action with prejucide.
If the Defendant fails to comply, Plaintiff may so state by Ex Parte declaration with notice to Defendant's counsel, obtain a Judgment for immediate restitution and possession of the premises.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
